error_signature: HTML ignores newlines in Gmail messages
title: Gmail message not preserving paragraph breaks
symptom: When sending a Gmail message, paragraphs are sent in a single line without breaks.
applies_when: Message type is set to HTML
not_this_if: Message type is set to Text
root_cause: When using HTML format for emails, the default behavior is to ignore newline characters. To create line breaks in HTML, specific HTML tags must be used to indicate where breaks should occur.
fix_steps: Edit the message content in the Gmail node

Replace newline characters with
tags for line breaks
Save the workflow and test the email again
agent_instruction:
Use
tags in the Gmail message to preserve paragraph breaks.
